title: Google Cloud Security Command Center Finding
description: Schema for a Security Command Center finding, representing a security issue or threat detected in a cloud resource.

name.description: The relative resource name of the finding

parent.description: The relative resource name of the source the finding belongs to

category.description: The additional taxonomy group within findings from a given source

resourceName.description: The full resource name of the Google Cloud resource this finding is for

externalUri.description: URI that points to a web page with additional information about the finding

sourceProperties.description: Source-specific properties that are set by the source that writes the finding

eventTime.description: The time the finding was first detected

createTime.description: The time at which the finding was created in Security Command Center

securityMarks.description: User-specified security marks applied to the finding

vulnerability.description: Represents vulnerability-specific fields like CVE and CVSS scores

SecurityMarks.description: User-specified security marks attached to the finding

name.description: The relative resource name of the SecurityMarks

baseScore.description: The base score for CVSS v3
